basics.name: Piyush Raj
basics.title: Aspiring Software Developer | AI/ML Enthusiast
basics.summary: Aspiring Associate Software Developer passionate about developing scalable, efficient, and user-focused applications. Interested in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, and exploring how intelligent technologies can be integrated into modern software solutions to solve real-world problems.

bullets: Processed and standardized a dataset of over 1,00,000 rows from multiple regions to support weekly analytics—enabled business teams to track KPIs across geography and time.
Designed smart Excel templates embedded with lookup functions and pivot logic, saving 40% reporting time across 4 departments.
Developed and maintained Power BI dashboards to visualize revenue trends, customer mix, and monthly performance—regularly used by managers and analysts across business units.
Spearheaded the development of responsive, mobile-first web interfaces using modern HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript, achieving seamless cross-browser compatibility.
Implemented advanced performance optimization techniques, including lazy loading and asset minification, which reduced average page load times by 35%.
Architected a scalable library of reusable UI components, streamlining the development workflow and reducing code duplication across multiple projects.
Collaborated closely with UI/UX designers to translate complex wireframes into pixel-perfect, accessible (WCAG compliant) web applications.
Integrated SEO best practices and semantic markup, contributing to a noticeable increase in organic search visibility for core landing pages.
Architected and deployed robust embedded C/C++ firmware for Arduino-based microcontroller systems, driving complex robotic movements and logic.
Engineered real-time automation workflows by optimizing sensor polling rates and interrupt service routines, reducing system latency by 25%.
Calibrated and synchronized a diverse array of hardware components, including ultrasonic sensors, servo motors, and gyroscopes, for precise spatial awareness and navigation.
Designed and executed rigorous hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) testing protocols to identify and resolve edge-case failures in robotic control loops.
Mentored team members on embedded systems best practices, circuit design, and debugging methodologies.

achievements.title: Data Standardization Impact
achievements.context: Processed over 1,00,000 rows to support weekly analytics and KPI tracking.

achievements.title: Reporting Efficiency
achievements.context: Saved 40% reporting time across 4 departments by designing smart Excel templates.

achievements.title: Microsoft Recognitions (2025)
achievements.context: Earned Microsoft Level 9 Profile with 30+ digital badges.

projects.title: Smart Cricket: IPL Winning Analysis Engine
bullets: Collected and cleaned historical IPL datasets using Pandas and performed feature engineering to extract key insights.
Visualized outcomes using Matplotlib and Seaborn to display team-wise performance and winning probabilities.
Conducted Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) to visualize trends such as toss impact, venue bias, and player performance.

data.label: User / Analyst
data.details: Interacts with the dashboards to view insights.

data.label: Power BI Dashboard
data.details: Visualizes revenue trends, team performance, and winning probabilities.

data.label: Python (Pandas/EDA)
data.details: Collects, cleans, and performs feature engineering on historical IPL datasets.

data.label: SQL Database
data.details: Stores the standardized and cleaned datasets for querying.

projects.title: Cognito web-AI Powered website Builder
bullets: Developed an AI-powered website builder that dynamically generates website layouts based on user input using Gemini API.
Enabled export/download functionality for AI-generated websites, supporting user-driven edits and reuse.
Delivered a user-friendly experience with export/download features and automatic domain setup for deployed sites.

data.label: User
data.details: Provides prompts and inputs to generate website layouts.

data.label: Frontend (HTML/JS)
data.details: User interface for the website builder and preview.

data.label: Gemini API
data.details: AI model that dynamically generates website layouts based on user input.

data.label: Export Service
data.details: Handles export/download functionality and automatic domain setup.

projects.title: Proctor AI: Intelligent Online Exam Proctoring System
bullets: Developed an intelligent online exam proctoring system using AI to monitor students and detect suspicious activities automatically.
Implemented face detection, eye/head movement tracking, and multiple person detection using OpenCV and MediaPipe to flag potential cheating attempts.
Integrated tab switching detection and audio monitoring to record background voices and minimize exam window events, logging all suspicious activities to an Admin Dashboard.

data.label: User Webcam
data.details: Captures real-time video and audio feed of the student.

data.label: Face Detection Model
data.details: Checks if the student's face is visible and detects multiple faces.

data.label: Behavior Analysis
data.details: Tracks eye/head movement and analyzes behavior using Computer Vision.

data.label: Suspicious Activity Detection
data.details: Flags looking away, frequent head movement, or looking down at phone.

data.label: Event Logger + Alerts
data.details: Logs tab switching, audio events, and generates warnings.

data.label: Admin Dashboard
data.details: Displays all logged suspicious activities for manual review.

education.institution: Arya College Of Engineering / Arya Institute of Engineering & Technology
